description: Risk-based branch-vs-master option equivalence checks after the 2026-07-06 core science gate.

scenarios.notes: Flux-scale normalization enabled on the generated rich demo data with provided reference sky models.
DD fast+medium phase calibration with DP3 image-based predict enabled on the generated rich demo data.
DD fast+medium phase calibration with WSClean predict enabled on the generated rich demo data.
DD fast+medium phase calibration with calibration BDA and imaging averaging/BDA enabled on the generated rich demo data.

scenarios.skip_reason: master CWL image scatter fails for multi-sector imaging because one generated scatter input is not per-sector; keep this covered by current-branch integration/benchmark runs until a stored mosaic reference is available
scenarios.notes: DD calibration, imaging, and mosaic assembly on a 2x2 sector grid using quadrant-balanced generated demo data.

scenarios.skip_reason: requires reliable IDGCal/screen support in the target environment
scenarios.notes: Record as skipped until the target environment can run screen workflows reproducibly.
